1.5.2: Reduced UI event load — card hover bindings cut by ~85%
Hotkey monitor now batches UI updates to reduce main thread pressure
Scroll events throttled to prevent input queue buildup
Toggle animation optimised — lighter and still smooth
Version number now displayed next to the Nebula logo
App now remembers your last selected server
Added Change Server button in the header
Script cards now show a live runtime counter
Update popup now shows patch notes for the new version
